falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,600 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower highs and continued weakness; this would signal the correction ended prematurely and the macro engine's bearish tilt was wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained complacency at pre-correction volatility levels would falsify the bottoming narrative, as the August 2024 bottom featured VIX spikes above 20 and elevated volatility for weeks; this would indicate no genuine capitulation occurred

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 5+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid of this magnitude would contradict the 'bottom' signal, as the August 2024 low coincided with yields rising on growth concerns; this would suggest recession fear rather than soft-landing bottoming, invalidating the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
